questionHtml: Using a demand and supply diagram, explain how the cut in fuel subsidies may have had “severe consequences for low-income households” (paragraph [7]).
markschemeHtml:
An alternate approach would be to draw a subsidy diagram that shows what happens to price as the subsidy is reduced.

Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For a demand and supply diagram, the vertical axis may be price, or p. The horizontal axis may be quantity or q. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using a demand and supply diagram, explain how the cut in fuel subsidies may have had “severe consequences for low-income households” (paragraph [7]).
